_notes: Hand-curated reference for prior Ten Tors 35-mile results. Sourced from news reports and team writeups; treat as anecdotal context, not official records. Times are wall-clock Sunday finishes. 'movingMinutes' is the walking-time equivalent (subtract 11h overnight from wall-clock elapsed since the 07:00 Saturday start).

entries.note: Mixed team finished ~45 min ahead of all others
Record at the time; first all-boy team to cross finish
